CVE-2024-4140.title: An excessive memory use issue (CWE-770) exists in Email-MIME, bef ...
CVE-2024-4140.summary: An excessive memory use issue (CWE-770) exists in Email-MIME, before version 1.954, which can cause denial of service when parsing multipart MIME messages. The patch set (from 2020 and 2024) limits excessive depth and the total number of parts.
